result:
All checks pass. I verified the index against the actual source documents.

Verification summary:
- **25 source docs**: docs 00–24 all present in both §1 freeze table and §2.1 classification table.
- **201 heading rows**: `^#{1,3} ` grep counts per doc exactly match §2.1 counts for all 25 docs (5,9,10,6,9,7,10,9,11,9,8,10,7,7,7,19,6,7,3,5,10,9,7,4,7 = 201).
- **Combined doc excluded correctly**: `matter_개발문서_통합본.md` (227 headings) is excluded; 428 total − 227 = 201.
- **Classified once**: anchors run sequentially #1..#N per doc with no gaps/duplicates; all classifications fall within the allowed 7-value set; silent_omission_count=0 holds.
- Spot-checked doc 08 (11 rows) and doc 15 (19 rows) — anchors map exactly to real headings.

{"overall_verdict":"PASS","finding_counts":{"p0":0,"p1":0,"p2":0,"p3":0},"findings":[],"notes":["Scope C-MPACK-01: verified all 25 source docs (00-24) and 201 heading rows are classified exactly once in matter-pack-source-index.md.","25 docs: present in both the SS1 freeze table (rows 00-24) and the SS2.1 classification table; no doc missing or duplicated.","201 heading rows: ran Grep '^#{1,3} ' over workbook/matter_dev_docs/*.md; per-doc counts exactly match SS2.1 table for every doc (00=5,01=9,02=10,03=6,04=9,05=7,06=10,07=9,08=11,09=9,10=8,11=10,12=7,13=7,14=7,15=19,16=6,17=7,18=3,19=5,20=10,21=9,22=7,23=4,24=7); sum=201.","Combined source doc matter_개발문서_통합본.md (227 headings) is correctly excluded per line 6; Grep total across 26 files was 428, and 428-227=201, corroborating the count.","Classified once: SS2.1 anchors run sequentially #1..#N per doc with no gaps or duplicate rows; every classification is within the allowed 7-value set (covered_but_requires_trace, adapt_required, adapt_required_pending_user_decision, new_required, defer_with_revisit_gate, reject_with_reason); SS2.1 check line silent_omission_count=0 and m365_doc08_rows=11 both hold.","Spot-checked anchor fidelity: doc 08 (11 rows, all defer_with_revisit_gate / M365 delegation) and doc 15 (19 rows) anchors map exactly to the real headings in the source files.","Secondary consistency: SS1 per-file line counts sum to 2,415, matching the stated '25 files, 2,415 lines total'. SHA256 values were not recomputed (read-only; no shasum tool)."]}
